title: AI Law and Policy Reports from McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Released by  Canadian Chamber of Commerce
content:
## AI Law and Policy Reports from McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Released by  Canadian Chamber of Commerce
Toronto, June 28, 2019 - The Canadian Chamber of Commerce has released three reports on AI law and policy by McCarthy Tétrault associates Adam Goldenberg and Mike Scherman.
The Automation Not Domination reports were published following cross-country roundtable discussions exploring the range of policy options for investment, innovation, integration and workforce sustainability pertaining to AI.
Each is designed to provide valuable insights on how the public and private sectors can keep pace and remain competitive in this rapidly changing space:
Legal and Regulatory Frameworks for AI
AI and the Workforce
In an ever-evolving commercial landscape, Adam Goldenberg and Mike Scherman’s perspective provides clients with an acute understanding of the ways in which transformative technologies are impacting industries to help them stay ahead of the curve.

#### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
- Adam Goldenberg Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto

- Michael Scherman Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
